title: leontodon × carreiroi
intro: Leontodon × carreiroi, a rare hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Leontodon hispidus and Leontodon autumalis, is a type of dandelion that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Leontodon × carreiroi include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
